login.title: WhatsApp Extractor
login.subtitle: Download your Google Drive backup
login.step1_1: 1. Open the following link in your browser:
login.step1_2: 2. Log in with your Google account.
login.step1_3: 3. Press F12 to open Developer Tools, go to the Application -> Cookies tab, and copy the value of the oauth_token cookie.
login.preferAppPassword: Prefer an App Password? Use Advanced Mode.

dashboard.step3Subtitle: Connection successful! Select the file you want to restore to your computer.
dashboard.cryptoSubtitle: Upload a .crypt14/.crypt15 file and your E2EE hash (64 hex) to decrypt it.

js.errTokenPass: Please enter the OAuth Token or an App Password.
js.errNetLogin: Network error connecting to the server
js.confirmTransfer:
Ensure your phone is connected via USB and USB Debugging is enabled.

This action will copy the downloaded database to your phone's storage.

Do you want to continue?
js.statusTransferring: Connecting to device and transferring files, please wait...
js.alertTransferDone:
Transfer completed!

Check the WhatsApp folder on your phone and install WhatsApp to restore.
js.errAdb: Error communicating with the local server for transfer.
js.decryptSuccess: Successful decryption! Your SQLite database has been downloaded.
js.errNetDecrypt: Network error while trying to decrypt.
